package rulefixtures

// scenario for range_copy_large_struct: `for _, v := range largeStructSlice` where the struct is > 64 bytes
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule628PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario628Positive(records []Rule628PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
